209460.name: Rage: The Scorchersв„ў
209460.description:
Battle an all-new maniacal bandit clan, wreak havoc with new brutally efficient weapons and explore undiscovered areas in RAGEвҖҷs new official add-on pack, RAGE: The Scorchersв„ў. Fight alongside new allies to thwart the Scorcher clanвҖҷs deadly plot to destroy the Wasteland.


The add-on pack also includes вҖҳUltra-NightmareвҖҷ, a new high difficulty mode, as well as an вҖҳExtended PlayвҖҷ option that allows you to play past the original ending of the game - giving you the opportunity to finish collecting items and achievements.


Developed by idВ® Software, the creators of DOOMВ® and QUAKEВ®, RAGE features intense first-person shooter action, breakneck vehicle combat, an expansive world to explore and jaw-dropping graphics powered by idвҖҷs revolutionary id TechВ® 5 technology.

Key Features


  • New Enemies and Weapons

    Fight the Scorcher clan, the WastelandвҖҷs most psychotic bandits, and conquer overwhelming odds with help from a brutal Nailgun featuring three distinct ammunition types.
  • Rediscover the Wasteland

    Explore six all-new environments, compete in a new season of Mutant Bash TV and play all-new mini-games. ThereвҖҷs more to the world of RAGE than ever before!
  • Ultra-Nightmare Mode

    Take your rage to another level with the new Ultra-Nightmare Mode, designed especially for hardcore players looking for the ultimate challenge.
  • Extended Play Mode & Combat Scenario Selection

    Continue exploring the Wasteland long after the final fight with the вҖҳExtended PlayвҖҷ option, and relive your favorite missions any time you want with the all-new вҖҳCombat Scenario SelectionвҖҷ menu.
